blockingIssues.description: Out-of-scope behavior change: default dimMode changed from 'classic' to 'rebarviz' in useMbdPipeAnnotationThree.ts during layout-engine extraction refactor.

Offset layering appears double-counted when offset_level > 0 (offset_level included in lane index and again applied as base-level offset), risking FE-002/FE-005 semantic ordering/spacing for payloads with offset_level.
Mixed phase-1 test assertion contradicts SEMANTIC_LANE_ORDER (portOffset < segmentOffset vs segment:0, port:1), potentially encoding wrong invariant and masking regressions.
renderTags() stores mbdLayoutResolution by calling resolveBranchLayout with role='cut_tubi' (likely copy/paste bug for tags), risking wrong semantics/metadata.

BRAN regression harness uses a minimal synthetic inline MbdPipeData rather than BRAN 24381_145717 or an approved captured equivalent fixture, so it does not prove determinism for the motivating topology.
Lane checks compare values across rerenders but do not assert lanes are present/meaningful (undefined===undefined could pass), undermining INT-001/INT-002 evidence.
Harness relies on optional/internal getter (getCutTubiAnnotations?.()) with optional chaining; this weakens regression coverage and can mask failures.

appliedUpdates.description: None (scrutiny validator only fixed malformed JSON in a review report file to allow synthesis).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define what qualifies as an "approved captured equivalent" fixture for BRAN regressions (when real BRAN payload is unavailable), and require referencing a fixture file (not inline synthetic objects) for BRAN-labeled regression harnesses.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review add-bran-specific-regression-harness: tests used a toy inline MbdPipeData; ambiguity makes it easy to satisfy harness without real topology coverage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Reviewer skill should include newer pure-layout tests in scoped vitest run
